subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath illumined all eyes through beholding His lights and hath caused all tongues to voice the most exalted remembrances in praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نور الابصار بمشاهده الانوار و انطق الالسن باعلی الاذکار فی نعت
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @transcendence; unknowability of God
